overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Grand Theft Auto V showing a character walking through a foggy Los Santos neighborhood at dawn. The character crosses streets, walks along an elevated highway overpass, and descends into a commercial area featuring a prominent circular 'BIG' sign and a liquor store with neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy urban street corner with residential buildings

events.description: crossing the street at the intersection
turning left to ascend the on-ramp

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk, crossing the street, and approaching the highway on-ramp

notable_agents.action: person in red cap standing at the crosswalk corner
dark colored car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: two-story corner building with distinctive blue roof
tall palm tree trunk on the sidewalk
single-story commercial building with flat roof and large windows

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a foggy urban street corner with a distinctive blue-roofed building. The character walks along the sidewalk, crosses the street at the intersection, and approaches the on-ramp while a pedestrian in a red cap stands nearby and cars pass through.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway walkway with concrete barriers

events.description: ascending the on-ramp from street level to elevated highway
large military transport truck passes by on the adjacent road

agents.ego_description: walking up the concrete on-ramp and continuing along the elevated highway walkway

notable_agents.action: large camouflage-patterned military truck driving on the highway
red sports car driving ahead on the road

entered.detail: concrete elevated highway structure with metal guard rails
massive circular elevated billboard structure visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the on-ramp to an elevated highway walkway, leaving the street-level buildings behind. The scene opens up to reveal a foggy cityscape with a massive circular 'BIG' sign visible in the distance. Military and civilian vehicles pass by on the adjacent road while the character walks along the concrete barrier.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending off-ramp to ground level intersection

events.description: descending the off-ramp back to street level
waiting for black car to pass at the bottom of the ramp

agents.ego_description: walking down the off-ramp and navigating the intersection at the bottom

notable_agents.action: black sedan stopped at the intersection waiting
person walking across the street in front of the stopped vehicle

entered.detail: single-story house with wooden fence and palm trees in yard
wooden utility poles with multiple overhead wires

segments.scene_description: The character descends the off-ramp back to ground level, entering a residential intersection. A black car waits at the bottom of the ramp while a pedestrian crosses in front of it. The BIG sign remains visible in the foggy distance, now more centered in the frame, while power lines and residential houses line the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with neon signage and large billboard

events.description: passing the liquor store with illuminated neon signs
black car drives past on the adjacent road

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past the liquor store toward the large circular sign structure

notable_agents.action: person in white tank top and orange cap walking on the sidewalk
black car driving along the street with brake lights on

entered.detail: commercial building with yellow neon LIQUOR signage and 24h sign
low concrete wall with red painted curb
green hedge row along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions to a commercial area featuring a liquor store with bright yellow neon signage. The character walks along the sidewalk passing other pedestrians while the massive circular BIG sign looms larger in the center of the view. The environment shifts from residential to commercial with the appearance of neon lighting and more pedestrian activity.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy urban neighborhood that transitions from quiet street corners to a bustling commercial district. It begins at a foggy intersection by a blue-roofed building, where the character crosses the street past a pedestrian in a red cap. As the character ascends an on-ramp to an elevated highway walkway, the perspective opens up to reveal a distant, massive circular BIG sign looming over a cityscape of passing military and civilian vehicles. The scene then shifts as the character descends back to ground level through a residential area of power lines and houses, with the BIG sign becoming more centered in the frame. Finally, the environment transforms into a commercial zone, moving past a liquor store with bright yellow neon signage and increased pedestrian activity as the large sign looms larger in the view.
